lessons.lesson: Monthly review 2026-05: accuracy reached 78.9%. Keep the regime filters that worked, but do not treat one good month as a permanent edge.
Monthly review 2026-05: category '기업' produced only 33% accuracy across 3 checks. Treat it as weak evidence until new validation improves it.
Monthly review 2026-04: accuracy reached 84.6%. Keep the regime filters that worked, but do not treat one good month as a permanent edge.
